title: lycianthes lycioides subsp. tomentosa
intro: Lycianthes lycioides subsp. tomentosa, also known as the woolly Lycianthes, is a type of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of wounds. Lycianthes lycioides subsp. tomentosa can be prepared in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
